request_parameters.name: owner
request_parameters.description: Repository space address (address path of the enterprise, organization, or individual)

request_parameters.name: author
request_parameters.description: Filter contributors by username. Supports specifying a username to get contribution data for that user. Returns contribution data for all users by default.

request_parameters.name: current_user
request_parameters.description: Whether to return data only for the current user. `true` indicates that only the contribution data of the current user will be returned; `false` or omission will result in returning the contribution data of all users. When set to `true`, it has a higher priority than the `author` parameter.

request_parameters.name: since
request_parameters.description: Start date, formatted as `YYYY-MM-DD` or `YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss`. Used to limit the start time of the contribution data returned.

request_parameters.name: until
request_parameters.description: End date in the format of `YYYY-MM-DD` or `YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss`. Used to limit the end time of the contribution data returned.

request_parameters.name: ref_name
request_parameters.description: Specify the ref_name (branch name, commit ID, or tag name) to get contribution data. If not provided or empty, use the `default branch`.

request_parameters.name: owner
request_parameters.description: Repository space address (address path of the enterprise, organization, or individual)

request_parameters.name: filter
request_parameters.description: filter: Criteria for filtering. Accepts 'all' (for all events), 'push', 'merged', 'issue', 'comments', 'team', 'project'.

request_parameters.name: before
request_parameters.description: Start date in the format `YYYY-MM-DD`. Used to limit the start time of the events returned.

request_parameters.name: after
request_parameters.description: End date in the format of `YYYY-MM-DD`. Used to limit the end time of the events returned.

request_parameters.name: per_page
request_parameters.description: The number of items per page, with a maximum of 100. The default is 20.

title: Get a Specific Issue of a Repository

request_parameters.name: owner
request_parameters.description: Repository space address (organization or individual's address path)

request_parameters.name: owner
request_parameters.description: Repository space address (organization or individual's address path)

request_parameters.name: state
request_parameters.description: Issue state: open, closed, or all. Default is all.

request_parameters.name: labels
request_parameters.description: A comma-separated list of labels. Such as: bug, performance

request_parameters.name: sort
request_parameters.description: Sorting criterion: creation time (created), update time (updated). Default: created

request_parameters.name: direction
request_parameters.description: Sort order: asc for ascending, desc for descending. Default: desc

request_parameters.name: since
request_parameters.description: The start update time, with the time format required as 2024-11-10T08:10:30.000%2B08:00 (Note that the + sign needs to be URL encoded as %2B)

request_parameters.name: per_page
request_parameters.description: The number of items per page, with a maximum of 100. The default is 20.

request_parameters.name: milestone
request_parameters.description: According to the milestone title. none for no milestones

request_parameters.name: creator
request_parameters.description: The username of the user who creates the Issues

request_parameters.name: created_after
request_parameters.description: Returns issues created after the specified time, for example: 2024-11-20T13:00:21+08:00

request_parameters.name: created_before
request_parameters.description: Returns questions created before the specified time, for example: 2024-11-20T13:00:21+08:00

request_parameters.name: updated_after
request_parameters.description: Returns issues updated after the specified time, for example: 2024-11-20T13:00:21+08:00

request_parameters.name: updated_before
request_parameters.description: Returns issues updated before the specified time, for example: 2024-11-20T13:00:21+08:00

request_parameters.name: search
request_parameters.description: Search for issue by keyword in title or content

title: List All Repositories For Authorized Users

request_parameters.name: visibility
request_parameters.description: public, private, or all; default: all

request_parameters.name: affiliation
request_parameters.description: owner (repository owner), collaborator (authorized user as a member of the repository), organization_member (authorized user as a member of the organization that owns the repository and has access to the repository), enterprise_member (authorized user as a member of the enterprise that owns the repository and has access to the repository), admin (all authorized users including all repositories in managed organizations and all repositories in managed enterprises). These can be combined with commas. For example: owner, organization_member or owner, collaborator, organization_member.

request_parameters.name: type
request_parameters.description: Filter user repositories: created(owner), personal, member, public, private. Cannot be used with the affiliation parameter, otherwise a 422 error will occur. Should be used with the visibility parameter, which has higher priority.

request_parameters.name: sort
request_parameters.description: Sort by: created, updated, pushed, full_name. Default: full_name

request_parameters.name: direction
request_parameters.description: If the sort parameter is full_name, use ascending (asc). Otherwise, use descending (desc).

request_parameters.name: per_page
request_parameters.description: The number of items per page, with a maximum of 100. The default is 20.

request_parameters.name: repo_type
request_parameters.description: Filter repository type, which can be code: code repository, model: model repository, dataset: dataset repository, space: space, all: all repository types. Default: code

request_parameters.name: owner
request_parameters.description: Repository space address (organization or individual's address path)

request_parameters.name: username
request_parameters.description: username (String, required) - The username of the user.

title: List authorized users' Pull Request list

request_parameters.name: state
request_parameters.description: Please professionally translate the following content into English, keeping the format unchanged. If the content is empty, do not translate it. Do not output any other content or prompts besides the translation! Return open, closed, locked, merged, or all merged requests, open: open; closed: closed; locked: locked; merged: merged; all: all. The default is to return all.

request_parameters.name: sort
request_parameters.description: Merge requests, created at: created; updated at: updated; merged at: merged_at. Sorted by created time by default.

request_parameters.name: direction
request_parameters.description: Merge requests sorted by the sort field in ascending or descending order, desc: descending; asc: ascending

request_parameters.name: created_after
request_parameters.description: Return merge requests created after the specified time, time format is ISO 8601 for example: 2024-11-20T13:00:21+08:00

request_parameters.name: created_before
request_parameters.description: Return the merge requests created before the specified time, the time format is ISO 8601, for example: 2024-11-20T13:00:21+08:00

request_parameters.name: updated_after
request_parameters.description: Return the merge requests updated after the specified time, in ISO 8601 format, for example: 2024-11-20T13:00:21+08:00

request_parameters.name: updated_before
request_parameters.description: Merge requests updated before the specified time, in ISO 8601 format, for example: 2024-11-20T13:00:21+08:00

request_parameters.name: scope
request_parameters.description: Return the merged pull requests within the given range, need_my_approve: pull requests that need my approval; created_by_me: pull requests created by me; assigned_to_me: pull requests assigned to me; need_my_review: pull requests that need my review. By default, return the ones I created.

request_parameters.name: source_branch
request_parameters.description: Merge request with the given source branch

request_parameters.name: target_branch
